name: lrmem1e4_steps900_exp024
hypothesis: FALSIFICATION TEST of the structural diagnosis (vanishing GDN3 retrieval gradient): 'vanishing' has a testable distinction — truly tiny/zero vs small-but-nonzero. exp006 (lr 1.5e-4, 800 steps) got 0.308 fragile; the MINIMUM-LR x MAXIMUM-TIME regime (lr 1e-4 floor, steps 900) is most likely to accumulate a small-but-nonzero retrieval signal. If tokacc climbs past 0.30 the gradient is merely small (diagnosis wrong, search reopens); if flat at ~0.30 through 900 steps at the floor LR, the gradient is genuinely vanishing (a small gradient would accumulate and climb) — strongly confirming the diagnosis.
